productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Shoes
description: U.S Polo Association believes in the spirit of Polo. The brand embodies an enthusiasm for competition, a passion for horses and an appreciation for all those who work to bring the sport together. Wear these casual derby shoes in premium quality leather to showcase the genuine spirit known throughout the world as Classic American Style -  comfortable and casual, but still perfectly put together.UpperLeather upper with contrast stitch and suede detailing with brand tag for heightened stylePadded tongue and collar for customised comfortLace-up system for a snug FitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortFabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone and geometric grooves for absolute grip, durability and easy turning of the feetshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
